mapper.sql: g.game_id AS gameId, g.game_date AS gameDate, g.home_team_id AS homeTeamId, ht.team_name AS homeTeamName, g.away_team_id AS awayTeamId, at.team_name AS awayTeamName, g.home_score AS homeScore, g.away_score AS awayScore, COUNT(pgs.player_id) AS statsCount
FROM Game g JOIN Team ht ON ht.team_id = g.home_team_id JOIN Team at ON at.team_id = g.away_team_id LEFT JOIN PlayerGameStats pgs ON pgs.game_id = g.game_id
GROUP BY g.game_id, g.game_date, g.home_team_id, ht.team_name, g.away_team_id, at.team_name, g.home_score, g.away_score
mapper.select: SELECT ranked.player_id AS playerId, ranked.player_name AS playerName, ranked.position AS position, ranked.team_id AS teamId, ranked.team_name AS teamName, ranked.points AS points, ranked.rebounds AS rebounds, ranked.assists AS assists, ranked.steals AS steals, ranked.blocks AS blocks, ranked.team_rank AS teamRank FROM ( SELECT p.player_id, p.name AS player_name, p.position, ap.current_team_id AS team_id, t.team_name AS team_name, pgs.points, pgs.rebounds, pgs.assists, pgs.steals, pgs.blocks, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ap.current_team_id ORDER BY pgs.points DESC, pgs.assists DESC, pgs.rebounds DESC, p.name ) AS team_rank FROM PlayerGameStats pgs JOIN Player p ON p.player_id = pgs.player_id LEFT JOIN ActivePlayer ap ON ap.player_id = p.player_id LEFT JOIN Team t ON t.team_id = ap.current_team_id WHERE pgs.game_id = #{gameId} ) ranked ORDER BY CASE WHEN ranked.team_id = #{homeTeamId} THEN 0 WHEN ranked.team_id = #{awayTeamId} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ranked.points DESC, ranked.player_name

SELECT p.player_id AS playerId, p.name AS playerName, p.position AS position, ap.current_team_id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, pgs.points AS points, pgs.rebounds AS rebounds, pgs.assists AS assists, pgs.steals AS steals, pgs.blocks AS blocks FROM PlayerGameStats pgs JOIN Player p ON p.player_id = pgs.player_id LEFT JOIN ActivePlayer ap ON ap.player_id = p.player_id LEFT JOIN Team t ON t.team_id = ap.current_team_id WHERE pgs.game_id = #{gameId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN ap.current_team_id = #{homeTeamId} THEN 0 WHEN ap.current_team_id = #{awayTeamId} THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, pgs.points DESC, p.name

SELECT pgs.player_id AS playerId, p.name AS playerName, p.position AS position, pgs.game_id AS gameId, ap.current_team_id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, pgs.points AS points, pgs.rebounds AS rebounds, pgs.assists AS assists, pgs.steals AS steals, pgs.blocks AS blocks FROM PlayerGameStats pgs JOIN Player p ON p.player_id = pgs.player_id LEFT JOIN ActivePlayer ap ON ap.player_id = p.player_id LEFT JOIN Team t ON t.team_id = ap.current_team_id WHERE pgs.player_id = #{playerId} AND pgs.game_id = #{gameId}
